description:
Returns selection damage. Same as [[getHitPointDamage]], only the argument is selection part instead of hit point.
{{Feature|informative|Some part names are in Czech; see the [[ArmA: Armed Assault: Selection Translations|translation table]].}}
name: getHit

ret.desc: before {{GVI|arma3|1.94|size= 0.75}}, [[Nothing]] was returned when an invalid ''selection'' was provided (now returns {{hl|0}})
